headline: Is Mondelez (MDLZ) Quietly Reframing Its Brand Narrative Through High‑Recycled Chocolate Packaging?
summary: LyondellBasell recently announced that Mondelez International, together with Amcor and Taghleef Industries, has introduced new Marabou chocolate bar packaging in Europe using CirculenRevive polymers with 100% attributed recycled content via an ISCC PLUS-certified mass balance approach, enabling packaging sourced from 75% recycled content. This collaboration not only tackles hard-to-recycle mixed plastic waste in food packaging, but also helps Mondelez prepare for anticipated European Union...
